name: Mastodon.Model

aliases.name: AccessTokenResult
aliases.type: { server : Mastodon.Model.Server, accessToken : Mastodon.Model.Token }

aliases.name: Account
aliases.type: { acct : String.String, avatar : String.String, created_at : String.String, display_name : String.String, followers_count : Basics.Int, following_count : Basics.Int, header : String.String, id : Mastodon.Model.AccountId, locked : Basics.Bool, note : String.String, statuses_count : Basics.Int, url : String.String, username : String.String }

aliases.name: AccountNotificationDate
aliases.type: { account : Mastodon.Model.Account, created_at : String.String }

aliases.name: AppRegistration
aliases.type: { server : Mastodon.Model.Server, scope : String.String, client_id : Mastodon.Model.ClientId, client_secret : Mastodon.Model.ClientSecret, id : String.String, redirect_uri : String.String }

aliases.name: Application
aliases.type: { name : String.String, website : Maybe.Maybe String.String }

aliases.name: Attachment
aliases.comment: Attachment can be an image, a video, an audio or a gifv
aliases.type: { id : String.String, type_ : String.String, url : String.String, remote_url : String.String, preview_url : Maybe.Maybe String.String, text_url : Maybe.Maybe String.String, description : Maybe.Maybe String.String }

aliases.name: Client
aliases.type: { server : Mastodon.Model.Server, token : Mastodon.Model.Token, account : Maybe.Maybe Mastodon.Model.Account }

aliases.name: Context
aliases.comment:
Context of a status

Contains ancestors statuses and descendants statuses
aliases.type: { ancestors : List.List Mastodon.Model.Status, descendants : List.List Mastodon.Model.Status }

aliases.name: Hashtag
aliases.type: { name : String.String, url : String.String, history : List.List Mastodon.Model.HashtagHistory }

aliases.name: HashtagHistory
aliases.type: { day : String.String, uses : String.String, accounts : String.String }

aliases.name: MediaRequestBody
aliases.type: { description : String.String }

aliases.name: Mention
aliases.type: { id : Mastodon.Model.AccountId, url : String.String, username : String.String, acct : String.String }

aliases.name: Notification
aliases.comment:
Notification

       - id: The notification ID
       - type_: One of: "mention", "reblog", "favourite", "follow"
       - created_at: The time the notification was created
       - account: The Account sending the notification to the user
       - status: The Status associated with the notification, if applicable
aliases.type: { id : String.String, type_ : String.String, created_at : String.String, account : Mastodon.Model.Account, status : Maybe.Maybe Mastodon.Model.Status }

aliases.name: NotificationAggregate
aliases.type: { id : String.String, type_ : String.String, status : Maybe.Maybe Mastodon.Model.Status, accounts : List.List Mastodon.Model.AccountNotificationDate, created_at : String.String }

aliases.name: Relationship
aliases.type: { id : String.String, blocking : Basics.Bool, followed_by : Basics.Bool, following : Basics.Bool, muting : Basics.Bool, requested : Basics.Bool }

aliases.name: SearchResults
aliases.type: { accounts : List.List Mastodon.Model.Account, statuses : List.List Mastodon.Model.Status, hashtags : List.List Mastodon.Model.Hashtag }

aliases.name: Status
aliases.type: { account : Mastodon.Model.Account, application : Maybe.Maybe Mastodon.Model.Application, content : String.String, created_at : String.String, edited_at : Maybe.Maybe String.String, favourited : Maybe.Maybe Basics.Bool, favourites_count : Basics.Int, id : Mastodon.Model.StatusId, in_reply_to_account_id : Maybe.Maybe String.String, in_reply_to_id : Maybe.Maybe Mastodon.Model.StatusId, media_attachments : List.List Mastodon.Model.Attachment, mentions : List.List Mastodon.Model.Mention, reblog : Maybe.Maybe Mastodon.Model.Reblog, reblogged : Maybe.Maybe Basics.Bool, reblogs_count : Basics.Int, sensitive : Maybe.Maybe Basics.Bool, spoiler_text : String.String, tags : List.List Mastodon.Model.Tag, uri : String.String, url : Maybe.Maybe String.String, visibility : String.String }

aliases.name: StatusEdit
aliases.type: { status : Mastodon.Model.Status, text : Maybe.Maybe String.String, spoiler_text : Maybe.Maybe String.String }

aliases.name: StatusEditRequestBody
aliases.type: { status : String.String, spoiler_text : Maybe.Maybe String.String, sensitive : Basics.Bool, media_ids : List.List String.String }

aliases.name: StatusRequestBody
aliases.type: { status : String.String, in_reply_to_id : Maybe.Maybe Mastodon.Model.StatusId, spoiler_text : Maybe.Maybe String.String, sensitive : Basics.Bool, visibility : String.String, media_ids : List.List String.String }

aliases.name: StatusSource
aliases.comment: Used to get the original content of a status
aliases.type: { id : Mastodon.Model.StatusId, text : String.String, spoiler_text : String.String }

aliases.name: Tag
aliases.type: { name : String.String, url : String.String }
